trackers.purpose: can you track the price of
trackers.name: Apple MacBook Air M4 15-inch
trackers.instructions: Extract the product name 'Apple 2025 MacBook Air (15-inch, Apple M4 chip with 10-core CPU and 10-core GPU, 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB) - Midnight;Arabic/English' and its current selling price 'AED 5,332.00'. Also, extract the 'List Price: AED 6,679.00' if available.

items.key: Apple 2025 MacBook Air (15-inch, Apple M4 chip with 10-core CPU and 10-core GPU, 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB) - Midnight;Arabic/English

snapshot.summary: Found 1 item with current price AED 5,332.00 and list price AED 6,679.00.

trackers.purpose: Track this for new inventory and dont share for accesories and apple care plan additions
trackers.name: FAB Apple Main Inventory
trackers.instructions: Extract the name and price of every product listed on all pages. Filter these products by excluding any item where its name contains 'AppleCare+', 'Charger', 'Cable', 'Wallet', 'Pencil', or 'AirTag'. Also exclude items where the name contains 'Case' AND does not contain 'Watch', or where the name contains 'Strap' AND does not contain 'Watch'. Track new and removed items from this filtered list.
